title: Display and Night Shift
drDigitalIntro:
You can adjust your screen brightness and warmth.
• Lower brightness in a dark room to reduce eye strain.
• Night Shift warms your screen colors at night — less blue light helps you sleep better.
• Find both settings in Settings.

playgroundTask.goal: You adjusted the display and turned on Night Shift

steps.say: Drag the Brightness slider down to about 60% — imagine it's dark outside.
Turn on Night Shift to warm the screen colors.

drDigitalSuccess: Notice the warmer, dimmer screen! Night Shift reduces blue light and lower brightness helps in dark rooms.
drDigitalHint: Go to Display and drag the brightness slider left, then go to Appearance and toggle Night Shift on.
